calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Julie D. Noe, Tel. No. 1-702-966-8231 appearing for Valor Funding, LLC;
W. Walters also presnt in court.

RULING - The matter was discussed whether Ms. Walters understand what she is giving up and receiving in lieu of the settlement. The court ruled as follows: PETITIONER VALOR FUNDING, LLC'S Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights for W. Walters is Granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
